title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 13 - 2017: Clement of Alexandria

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief late-night update on his 'Living in Boulder' vlog series. He explains recent upload difficulties, mentions completing a video on Cyprian and working on one about Clement of Alexandria, and shares personal updates including his mom getting a tricycle and plans to sell his motorcycle to his brother.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: frustrated by repeated crashes but persisting with the church fathers series
still feels like he can't finish it but is tracking ahead and nearly done
planning to sell it to his brother
